chapter_title.en: Chapter on Imprisonment Due to the Implementation of Rulings

text: 3261 - رَوَى صَفْوَانُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ عَنْ عَامِرِ بْنِ اَلسِّمْطِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلرَّجُلِ يَقَعُ عَلَى أُخْتِهِ قَالَ "يُضْرَبُ ضَرْبَةً بِالسَّيْفِ بَلَغَتْ مِنْهُ مَا بَلَغَتْ فَإِنْ عَاشَ خُلِّدَ فِي اَلْحَبْسِ حَتَّى يَمُوتَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3261 - Safwan ibn Mihran narrated from Amir ibn al-Simt, from Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain (as) regarding a man who commits intercourse with his sister.
Imam (as) said: "He is struck with a sword, and whatever injury it causes will be his fate. If he survives, he is to be imprisoned for life until he dies."
